creator: amvandemore@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE-p7 amd64

Fresh portsnap

# portmaster /usr/ports/sysutils/zfsnap

<snip>

===>  Cleaning for zfsnap-1.11.0
===>>> Waiting on fetch & checksum for sysutils/zfsnap <<<===
===>   zfsnap-1.11.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> zfsnap-1.11.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles//.
=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/graudeejs/zfSnap/legacy.tar.gz/v1.11.0?dummy=/zfsnap-1.11.0.tar.gz
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/graudeejs/zfSnap/legacy.tar.gz/v1.11.0?dummy=/zfsnap-1.11.0.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 4973, actual 4970
=> Attempting to fetch http://codeload.github.com/graudeejs/zfSnap/legacy.tar.gz/v1.11.0?dummy=/zfsnap-1.11.0.tar.gz

It repeatedly tries to download the same file from the same location so this loops.
